title: selago oresigena
intro: Selago oresigena, also known as blue mountain-sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The leaves and flowers of the blue mountain-sage plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm the effectiveness of these preparations.
